name: auth-entra
description: Single sign-on via Azure Entra ID (formerly Azure AD) with IdP group-to-team sync

configSchema.label: Group Claim Name
configSchema.description: The JWT claim containing Entra group IDs

configSchema.label: Group Mapping (JSON)
configSchema.description: Maps Entra group IDs to dashboard team names, e.g. {"group-uuid-1": "Frontend Team"}

configSchema.label: Auto-Create Teams
configSchema.description: Automatically create teams that do not yet exist in the dashboard

configSchema.label: Sync Mode
configSchema.description: additive: only add memberships; mirror: also remove memberships not present in IdP groups
